settings.resetConfirm: Reset all settings to default values?

info.title: Rosary
info.subtitle: "Prayerful listening"
info.aboutText: The Rosary App accompanies you in prayer – meditative, distraction-free, and at your own pace. With single-line scrolling text, multilingual support (German, English, Latin), and current news.
info.privacyText: This app does not collect any personal data. No trackers, no analytics tools, no cloud connection. All prayer data is stored locally. News is loaded from a configurable URL – defaulting to GitHub Pages.
info.impressumText: Information according to §5 TMG. Operator of the app & website: Otto Fischer, George-Marshall Str. 13 B, 65197 Wiesbaden, Germany.
info.licenseText:
This app is protected by copyright. All rights reserved.

Prayer texts are in the public domain.
info.authorText:
Developed with love for prayer.
